title: No error is given when incorrect timezone value is specified for a timetz column
poc: CREATE TABLE TIMETZ_TBL (f1 time(2) with time zone);
INSERT INTO TIMETZ_TBL VALUES ('00:00 bla blah');
SELECT f1, cast(f1 as varchar(30)) as time_str FROM TIMETZ_TBL;
INSERT INTO TIMETZ_TBL VALUES ('00:00:20 +00:00 bla blah');
key_bug_features: Incorrect timezone value for timetz column
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE TIMETZ_TBL (f1 time(2) with time zone, f2 varchar(50) NOT NULL);
INSERT INTO TIMETZ_TBL VALUES ('00:01:00 +01:00', 'Another Valid Timezone');
INSERT INTO TIMETZ_TBL VALUES ('00:02:00 +02:00', 'Yet Another Valid Timezone');
SELECT f1, f2, cast(f1 as varchar(30)) as time_str FROM TIMETZ_TBL WHERE f1 IS NOT NULL;
